title: RBI (Commercial Banks – Interest Rate on Deposits) Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
RBI has temporarily removed interest rate restrictions on specified NRE and FCNR(B) deposits. Commercial banks can offer more competitive rates on eligible deposits until September 30, 2026.
The post RBI (Commercial Banks – Interest Rate on Deposits) Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
